lessons.title: Scanning Fundamentals & TCP Flags 🚦
lessons.description: Understand the TCP handshake and how different scans manipulate it.

lessons.title: Nmap: The Swiss Army Knife 🔪
lessons.description: Master essential Nmap flags, timing, and output formats for effective scanning.

lessons.title: Host Discovery & Port Scanning Techniques 🔍
lessons.description: Learn ping sweeps, SYN scans, UDP scans, and when to use each.

lessons.title: Service & Version Detection 🧬
lessons.description: Identify exactly what software and version is running on open ports.

lessons.title: Banner Grabbing & OS Fingerprinting 🖥️
lessons.description: Manually connect to services and deduce the operating system.

lessons.title: Service Enumeration Deep Dive 📂
lessons.description: Extract usernames, shares, and configuration from SMB, SNMP, FTP, and SSH.

lessons.title: Firewall & IDS Evasion 🥷
lessons.description: Techniques to avoid detection while scanning.
